<function=python>

# Check agent position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
for n in nodes:
    if n['hash'] == 'fa982fde30da5312':
        print(f"Agent: boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Agent should be at rows 8-12, cols 26-30 (room 3) or rows 14-18, cols 26-30.
# Let me check and then try RIGHT.
lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
for i in range(8, 20):
    if 'b' in lines[i][24:40]:
        print(f"Row {i}: cols 24-40: {lines[i][24:40]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
